scripts.desktop:build: npm run tauri -- build --features macos-private-api && node scripts/collect-release.mjs
scripts.desktop:build:macos-arm64: npm run tauri -- build --features macos-private-api --target aarch64-apple-darwin && node scripts/collect-release.mjs --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.desktop:build:macos-x64: npm run tauri -- build --features macos-private-api --target x86_64-apple-darwin && node scripts/collect-release.mjs --target x86_64-apple-darwin
